title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.870 - Proceedings for the distribution of money
text:
521.870.  Proceedings for the distribution of money. — Whenever money made on any execution or executions or other writ or writs is brought into the court out of which the eldest of such executions or other writs was issued, such court shall order the distribution or payment of such money on the motion of any person interested therein and on such notice as the court may, by rule or otherwise, direct.  On his compliance with such order, the officer returning such execution or executions or other writ or writs shall be discharged of his liability for such money; but from any such final order an appeal shall lie as in other cases, and nothing herein contained shall be construed to discharge any officer from liability for not properly executing any process or for a false return thereon.
(RSMo 1939 § 15697) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14749
